assignments.name: addDummyCollection

assignments.name: setDefaultValueForDummyCollection
assignments.label: dummyCollectionへの初期値割り当て

assignments.name: setDefaultValueForLoopCounter
assignments.label: loopCounterへの初期値割り当て

assignments.name: setExistValueTargetScheduleNextFY
assignments.label: 割り当て（既存用）：targetScheduleNextFY

assignments.name: setNewValueTargetScheduleNextFY
assignments.label: 割り当て（新規用）：targetScheduleNextFY

assignments.name: setValueCounterToCheckNextFiscalYear
assignments.label: counterToCheckNextFiscalYearへの値割り当て

assignments.name: updLoopCounter
assignments.label: loopCounterのデクリメント

collectionProcessors.name: checkIsExsistContactSchedule_syunkoubi
collectionProcessors.label: スケジュール存在確認：竣工日

constants.description: 会計期初月を記入。2023/07/01が期初であるケースにおけるこの定数の値は「7」
constants.name: noharaFirstMonth

decisions.name: branchCreateNewContact_schedule
decisions.label: 分岐：年度跨ぎ用スケジュールの作成

rules.name: caseCreateNewContact_schedule
rules.label: 年度跨ぎ用の得意先担当者スケジュールを作成

rules.name: caseGetNewContact_schedule
rules.label: 年度跨ぎ用の得意先担当者スケジュールを取得

decisions.name: branchForDeleteScheduleConflict
decisions.label: 重複スケジュール登録を削除

rules.name: caseTrueIsScheduleConflict
rules.label: 重複スケジュールの削除

rules.name: caseTrueIsCreatedTargetScheduleNextFY
rules.label: 更新：次年度担当者スケジュール（新規）

rules.name: caseUpdTargetScheduleNextFY
rules.label: 更新：次年度担当者スケジュール（既存）

formulas.name: beginningDate_syunkoubi
formulas.expression: IF( MONTH({!$Record.syunkoubi__c}) >= {!beginningMonthFiscalYear}, DATE(YEAR({!$Record.syunkoubi__c}), {!beginningMonthFiscalYear}, 1), DATE(YEAR({!$Record.syunkoubi__c}) - 1, {!beginningMonthFiscalYear}, 1) )

formulas.name: beginningDate_tyakkoubi
formulas.expression: IF( MONTH({!$Record.tyakkoubi__c}) >= {!beginningMonthFiscalYear}, DATE(YEAR({!$Record.tyakkoubi__c}), {!beginningMonthFiscalYear}, 1), DATE(YEAR({!$Record.tyakkoubi__c}) - 1, {!beginningMonthFiscalYear}, 1) )

formulas.name: initTest
formulas.expression: TEXT({!$Record.clientCompDateNextProperty__c})

formulas.name: initValueOfProperty_10_1
initValueOfProperty_10_2
initValueOfProperty_10_3
initValueOfProperty_11_1
initValueOfProperty_11_2
initValueOfProperty_11_3
initValueOfProperty_12_1
initValueOfProperty_12_2
initValueOfProperty_12_3
initValueOfProperty_1_1
initValueOfProperty_1_2
initValueOfProperty_1_3
initValueOfProperty_2_1
initValueOfProperty_2_2
initValueOfProperty_2_3
initValueOfProperty_3_1
initValueOfProperty_3_2
initValueOfProperty_3_3
initValueOfProperty_4_1
initValueOfProperty_4_2
initValueOfProperty_4_3
initValueOfProperty_5_1
initValueOfProperty_5_2
initValueOfProperty_5_3
initValueOfProperty_6_1
initValueOfProperty_6_2
initValueOfProperty_6_3
initValueOfProperty_7_1
initValueOfProperty_7_2
initValueOfProperty_7_3
initValueOfProperty_8_1
initValueOfProperty_8_2
initValueOfProperty_8_3
initValueOfProperty_9_1
initValueOfProperty_9_2
initValueOfProperty_9_3
isMatchTargetYear
formulas.expression: IF( AND(MONTH({!$Record.tyakkoubi__c}) >= {!noharaFirstMonth}, MONTH({!$Record.tyakkoubi__c}) <= 12), TEXT ( YEAR( {!$Record.tyakkoubi__c} ) ) & "/" & TEXT ( {!noharaFirstMonth} ), TEXT ( YEAR( {!$Record.tyakkoubi__c} )-1 ) & "/" & TEXT ( {!noharaFirstMonth} ) ) == IF( AND(MONTH({!loopFindTargetYearRecord.targetYear__c}) >= {!noharaFirstMonth}, MONTH({!loopFindTargetYearRecord.targetYear__c}) <= 12), TEXT ( YEAR( {!loopFindTargetYearRecord.targetYear__c} ) ) & "/" & TEXT ( {!noharaFirstMonth} ), TEXT ( YEAR( {!loopFindTargetYearRecord.targetYear__c} )-1 ) & "/" & TEXT ( {!noharaFirstMonth} ) )

formulas.name: isOccurCrossYear
formulas.expression: {!beginningDate_syunkoubi} != {!beginningDate_tyakkoubi}

formulas.name: isScheduleConflict
formulas.expression: OR( {!initValueOfProperty_1_1} == NULL, {!initValueOfProperty_1_2} == NULL, {!initValueOfProperty_1_3} == NULL, {!initValueOfProperty_2_1} == NULL, {!initValueOfProperty_2_2} == NULL, {!initValueOfProperty_2_3} == NULL, {!initValueOfProperty_3_1} == NULL, {!initValueOfProperty_3_2} == NULL, {!initValueOfProperty_3_3} == NULL, {!initValueOfProperty_4_1} == NULL, {!initValueOfProperty_4_2} == NULL, {!initValueOfProperty_4_3} == NULL, {!initValueOfProperty_5_1} == NULL, {!initValueOfProperty_5_2} == NULL, {!initValueOfProperty_5_3} == NULL, {!initValueOfProperty_6_1} == NULL, {!initValueOfProperty_6_2} == NULL, {!initValueOfProperty_6_3} == NULL, {!initValueOfProperty_7_1} == NULL, {!initValueOfProperty_7_2} == NULL, {!initValueOfProperty_7_3} == NULL, {!initValueOfProperty_8_1} == NULL, {!initValueOfProperty_8_2} == NULL, {!initValueOfProperty_8_3} == NULL, {!initValueOfProperty_9_1} == NULL, {!initValueOfProperty_9_2} == NULL, {!initValueOfProperty_9_3} == NULL, {!initValueOfProperty_10_1} == NULL, {!initValueOfProperty_10_2} == NULL, {!initValueOfProperty_10_3} == NULL, {!initValueOfProperty_11_1} == NULL, {!initValueOfProperty_11_2} == NULL, {!initValueOfProperty_11_3} == NULL, {!initValueOfProperty_12_1} == NULL, {!initValueOfProperty_12_2} == NULL, {!initValueOfProperty_12_3} == NULL )

formulas.name: isTargetUpdNextFiscalYear
formulas.expression: NOT(IF( AND( {!processingTargetDate} >= DATE(YEAR({!beginningDate_tyakkoubi}), MONTH({!beginningDate_tyakkoubi}), 1), {!processingTargetDate} < DATE(YEAR({!beginningDate_tyakkoubi}) + 1, MONTH({!beginningDate_tyakkoubi}), 1) ), TRUE, FALSE ))

formulas.description: 着工と竣工が同じ月なら0となる。
formulas.name: monthDif
formulas.expression: IF( ({!YEAR($Record.syunkoubi__c)} - {!YEAR($Record.tyakkoubi__c)}) * 12 + ({!MONTH($Record.syunkoubi__c)} - {!MONTH($Record.tyakkoubi__c)}) >= 0, ({!YEAR($Record.syunkoubi__c)} - {!YEAR($Record.tyakkoubi__c)}) * 12 + ({!MONTH($Record.syunkoubi__c)} - {!MONTH($Record.tyakkoubi__c)}), -1 )

formulas.name: processingTargetDate
formulas.expression: DATE( YEAR({!$Record.tyakkoubi__c}) + FLOOR((MONTH({!$Record.tyakkoubi__c}) + {!loopCounter} - 1) / 12), MOD(MONTH({!$Record.tyakkoubi__c}) + {!loopCounter} - 1, 12) + 1, DAY({!$Record.tyakkoubi__c}) )

formulas.description: 1月：3つの項目のどれがブランクになっているか？
formulas.name: updItemNumOf1
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!loopFindTargetYearRecord.property_1_1__c}), 1, IF( ISBLANK({!loopFindTargetYearRecord.property_1_2__c}), 2, IF( ISBLANK({!loopFindTargetYearRecord.property_1_3__c}), 3, 0)))

formulas.name: updItemNumOf10
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!loopFindTargetYearRecord.property_10_1__c}), 1, IF( ISBLANK({!loopFindTargetYearRecord.property_10_2__c}), 2, IF( ISBLANK({!loopFindTargetYearRecord.property_10_3__c}), 3, 0)))

formulas.name: updItemNumOf10_nextFy
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!targetScheduleNextFY.property_10_1__c}), 1, IF( ISBLANK({!targetScheduleNextFY.property_10_2__c}), 2, IF( ISBLANK({!targetScheduleNextFY.property_10_3__c}), 3, 0)))

formulas.name: updItemNumOf11
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!loopFindTargetYearRecord.property_11_1__c}), 1, IF( ISBLANK({!loopFindTargetYearRecord.property_11_2__c}), 2, IF( ISBLANK({!loopFindTargetYearRecord.property_11_3__c}), 3, 0)))

formulas.name: updItemNumOf11_nextFy
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!targetScheduleNextFY.property_11_1__c}), 1, IF( ISBLANK({!targetScheduleNextFY.property_11_2__c}), 2, IF( ISBLANK({!targetScheduleNextFY.property_11_3__c}), 3, 0)))

formulas.name: updItemNumOf12
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!loopFindTargetYearRecord.property_12_1__c}), 1, IF( ISBLANK({!loopFindTargetYearRecord.property_12_2__c}), 2, IF( ISBLANK({!loopFindTargetYearRecord.property_12_3__c}), 3, 0)))

formulas.name: updItemNumOf12_nextFy
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!targetScheduleNextFY.property_12_1__c}), 1, IF( ISBLANK({!targetScheduleNextFY.property_12_2__c}), 2, IF( ISBLANK({!targetScheduleNextFY.property_12_3__c}), 3, 0)))

formulas.name: updItemNumOf1_nextFy
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!targetScheduleNextFY.property_1_1__c}), 1, IF( ISBLANK({!targetScheduleNextFY.property_1_2__c}), 2, IF( ISBLANK({!targetScheduleNextFY.property_1_3__c}), 3, 0)))

formulas.name: updItemNumOf2
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!loopFindTargetYearRecord.property_2_1__c}), 1, IF( ISBLANK({!loopFindTargetYearRecord.property_2_2__c}), 2, IF( ISBLANK({!loopFindTargetYearRecord.property_2_3__c}), 3, 0)))

formulas.name: updItemNumOf2_nextFy
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!targetScheduleNextFY.property_2_1__c}), 1, IF( ISBLANK({!targetScheduleNextFY.property_2_2__c}), 2, IF( ISBLANK({!targetScheduleNextFY.property_2_3__c}), 3, 0)))

formulas.name: updItemNumOf3
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!loopFindTargetYearRecord.property_3_1__c}), 1, IF( ISBLANK({!loopFindTargetYearRecord.property_3_2__c}), 2, IF( ISBLANK({!loopFindTargetYearRecord.property_3_3__c}), 3, 0)))

formulas.name: updItemNumOf3_nextFy
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!targetScheduleNextFY.property_3_1__c}), 1, IF( ISBLANK({!targetScheduleNextFY.property_3_2__c}), 2, IF( ISBLANK({!targetScheduleNextFY.property_3_3__c}), 3, 0)))

formulas.name: updItemNumOf4
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!loopFindTargetYearRecord.property_4_1__c}), 1, IF( ISBLANK({!loopFindTargetYearRecord.property_4_2__c}), 2, IF( ISBLANK({!loopFindTargetYearRecord.property_4_3__c}), 3, 0)))

formulas.name: updItemNumOf4_nextFy
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!targetScheduleNextFY.property_4_1__c}), 1, IF( ISBLANK({!targetScheduleNextFY.property_4_2__c}), 2, IF( ISBLANK({!targetScheduleNextFY.property_4_3__c}), 3, 0)))

formulas.name: updItemNumOf5
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!loopFindTargetYearRecord.property_5_1__c}), 1, IF( ISBLANK({!loopFindTargetYearRecord.property_5_2__c}), 2, IF( ISBLANK({!loopFindTargetYearRecord.property_5_3__c}), 3, 0)))

formulas.name: updItemNumOf5_nextFy
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!targetScheduleNextFY.property_5_1__c}), 1, IF( ISBLANK({!targetScheduleNextFY.property_5_2__c}), 2, IF( ISBLANK({!targetScheduleNextFY.property_5_3__c}), 3, 0)))

formulas.name: updItemNumOf6
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!loopFindTargetYearRecord.property_6_1__c}), 1, IF( ISBLANK({!loopFindTargetYearRecord.property_6_2__c}), 2, IF( ISBLANK({!loopFindTargetYearRecord.property_6_3__c}), 3, 0)))

formulas.name: updItemNumOf6_nextFy
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!targetScheduleNextFY.property_6_1__c}), 1, IF( ISBLANK({!targetScheduleNextFY.property_6_2__c}), 2, IF( ISBLANK({!targetScheduleNextFY.property_6_3__c}), 3, 0)))

formulas.name: updItemNumOf7
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!loopFindTargetYearRecord.property_7_1__c}), 1, IF( ISBLANK({!loopFindTargetYearRecord.property_7_2__c}), 2, IF( ISBLANK({!loopFindTargetYearRecord.property_7_3__c}), 3, 0)))

formulas.name: updItemNumOf7_nextFy
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!targetScheduleNextFY.property_7_1__c}), 1, IF( ISBLANK({!targetScheduleNextFY.property_7_2__c}), 2, IF( ISBLANK({!targetScheduleNextFY.property_7_3__c}), 3, 0)))

formulas.name: updItemNumOf8
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!loopFindTargetYearRecord.property_8_1__c}), 1, IF( ISBLANK({!loopFindTargetYearRecord.property_8_2__c}), 2, IF( ISBLANK({!loopFindTargetYearRecord.property_8_3__c}), 3, 0)))

formulas.name: updItemNumOf8_nextFy
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!targetScheduleNextFY.property_8_1__c}), 1, IF( ISBLANK({!targetScheduleNextFY.property_8_2__c}), 2, IF( ISBLANK({!targetScheduleNextFY.property_8_3__c}), 3, 0)))

formulas.name: updItemNumOf9
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!loopFindTargetYearRecord.property_9_1__c}), 1, IF( ISBLANK({!loopFindTargetYearRecord.property_9_2__c}), 2, IF( ISBLANK({!loopFindTargetYearRecord.property_9_3__c}), 3, 0)))

formulas.name: updItemNumOf9_nextFy
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!targetScheduleNextFY.property_9_1__c}), 1, IF( ISBLANK({!targetScheduleNextFY.property_9_2__c}), 2, IF( ISBLANK({!targetScheduleNextFY.property_9_3__c}), 3, 0)))

formulas.name: updTargetMonth
formulas.expression: MOD(MONTH({!$Record.tyakkoubi__c}) + {!loopCounter} - 1, 12) + 1

Flow.interviewLabel: 【物件】CS-担当中物件更新フロー(2) {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: 【物件】CS-担当中物件更新フロー(2)
